svg.title: TypeScript Learning Roadmap: Beginner to Advanced
svg.desc: A visual roadmap showing TypeScript concepts organized into four stages: Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced, and Expert

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript setup and installation for beginners')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript basic types with examples')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript type inference')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript arrays and tuples')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript functions and type annotations')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript object types and type aliases')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript interfaces vs type aliases')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript union and intersection types')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript enums and literal types')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript classes with access modifiers')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript generics with examples')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript narrowing and type guards')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript modules and namespaces')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript utility types like Partial, Required, Pick, Omit')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript decorators')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript conditional types with examples')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript mapped types')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript template literal types')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript infer keyword in conditional types')
sendPrompt('Explain advanced TypeScript generics patterns')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript declaration files and .d.ts files')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript satisfies operator and const assertions')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript discriminated unions and exhaustive checks')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript module augmentation and declaration merging')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript type-level programming and type challenges')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript compiler API usage')
sendPrompt('Explain writing TypeScript custom transformers and plugins')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript covariance and contravariance')
sendPrompt('Explain TypeScript performance optimization in large codebases')
sendPrompt('Explain writing a TypeScript ESLint plugin or custom lint rule')
sendPrompt('How to use TypeScript with React?')
sendPrompt('How to use TypeScript with Node.js and Express?')
sendPrompt('How to use TypeScript with Next.js?')
sendPrompt('How to use TypeScript with NestJS?')
sendPrompt('How to use TypeScript with Zod for runtime validation?')

svg.text: Tap any card to dive deeper
